scripts.db:migrate:local: cd apps/api && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply meridian-nexus-db --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: cd apps/api && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply meridian-nexus-db --remote
scripts.db:seed:local: cd apps/api && npx wrangler d1 execute meridian-nexus-db --local --file=seed/seed.sql
scripts.db:seed:remote: cd apps/api && npx wrangler d1 execute meridian-nexus-db --remote --file=seed/seed.sql
